failed: The payment could not be initiated. Please try again.
capture_failed: The payment could not be finalized. Please contact support.
refund_failed: The refund failed. Please contact support.
not_authorized: You are not authorized to view this information.
confirmation_failed: Payment confirmation failed. Please try again.
tester_no_stripe: The tester does not have a payment account set up.
invoice_not_available: The invoice is not yet available.
not_campaign_owner: You are not the owner of this campaign.
already_in_status: Campaign is already in status "{status}". Payment can only be processed for DRAFT campaigns.
already_initiated: A payment has already been initiated for this campaign. Please contact support if you believe this is an error.
kyc_required: Tester must complete Identity verification after {threshold} completed tests to continue receiving payments.
transfer_failed: Failed to transfer funds to tester.
no_payment_found: No payment found for this campaign.
no_offer_found: No offer found for this campaign.
charges_not_enabled: Stripe account is not enabled for charges.
